## [00:00 - 00:29]

Reduce to the ridiculous. It's $1,000 a month. Look that's $30 a day. You're going to live in this home, wake up in this home, go to sleep every day in this home. You'll build your life here, your family here, create your security here. Your future gets created for what? $30 a day. You spend what? Seven hours a day in your home or 10 hours or 12 hours? What is that? $3 an hour? Look, you can't rent a car for $40 a day. Let's do this.
